name: Rikka Blizzard
desc: If you have a "Rikka" monster in your Deck, hand, or GY: Reveal 5 "Rikka" monsters from your Deck, hand, and/or GY; Tribute all monsters in your opponent's field and hand. You can instead reveal 10 "Rikka" cards (monsters, Spells, and/or Traps) from your Deck, hand, and/or GY; Tribute all cards in your opponent's field and hand, then Special Summon to your field up to that many "Rikka" monsters you revealed. You can only activate 1 "Rikka Blizzard" per turn.
strings: Reveal 5 Rikka monsters: Tribute opponent's monsters
Reveal 10 Rikka cards: Tribute all opponent's cards and SS
